name: Marinated Pineapple into Coriander, Ginger and Mint Syrup
steps: Mix all together and Vac-pack. (Label 5 day)
Cut the half pineapple with the skin with the ham-slicer at 1.5mm.
Vac-pack in the syrup with the chopped herbs.
Mix all the dry together, bring the water to 90°C and add the dry. Hand blend till fluid.
Bring to 90°C, pour in a container and cool down in the fridge. (Label 1 month)
Blitz the juice with a sorbetque and lime juice with the base on a Vitaprep.
When all the leaves are dissolved add by the rest of the sorbet to make sure the sorbet is smooth.
Pass through a chinois and in the ice cream machine straight away.
Store in Pacos and freeze. (Label 1 month)

other_details.notes: Make at least 6 hours before use.
